data.title: Register test quality gate hook and add dso-config.conf keys
data.description:
## Description
Register the new hook in the pre-commit pipeline and add configuration keys.

### Steps
1. Add test_quality.tool=bash-grep to .claude/dso-config.conf (default: bash-grep for zero-dependency start)
2. Add test_quality.enabled=true to .claude/dso-config.conf
3. Register hook in .pre-commit-config.yaml
4. Update reinstall-hooks.sh if needed

### File Impact
- .claude/dso-config.conf — Edit
- .pre-commit-config.yaml — Edit (if exists)

## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Config key exists in dso-config.conf
  Verify: grep -q "test_quality.tool" .claude/dso-config.conf
